_comment: Key = column/variable code used in the dashboard and CSV. Value = full clinical name as used in the Performance Report template.
IsoPt200L_ext_: Isometric Knee Extension Peak Torque at 200ms — Left (Nm)
IsoPt200R_ext_: Isometric Knee Extension Peak Torque at 200ms — Right (Nm)
LSI_Isopt200_ext_: Isometric Knee Extension Peak Torque at 200ms — LSI (%)
Jang_ptL_ext_: Concentric Knee Extension Joint Angle at Peak Torque — Left (°)
Jang_ptR_ext_: Concentric Knee Extension Joint Angle at Peak Torque — Right (°)
LSI_Jang_ext_: Concentric Knee Extension Joint Angle at Peak Torque — LSI (%)
IsoPt200L_fle_: Isometric Knee Flexion Peak Torque at 200ms — Left (Nm)
IsoPt200R_fle_: Isometric Knee Flexion Peak Torque at 200ms — Right (Nm)
LSI_Isopt200_fle_: Isometric Knee Flexion Peak Torque at 200ms — LSI (%)
Jang_ptL_fle_: Concentric Knee Flexion Joint Angle at Peak Torque — Left (°)
Jang_ptR_fle_: Concentric Knee Flexion Joint Angle at Peak Torque — Right (°)
LSI_Jang_fle_: Concentric Knee Flexion Joint Angle at Peak Torque — LSI (%)
EcDel_DLCMJ_L_: Double Leg CMJ Eccentric Deceleration Impulse — Left (N·s)
EcDel_DLCMJ_R_: Double Leg CMJ Eccentric Deceleration Impulse — Right (N·s)
LSI_EcDel_DLCMJ_: Double Leg CMJ Eccentric Deceleration Impulse — LSI (%)
ci_left_DL_: Double Leg CMJ Concentric Impulse — Left (N·s)
ci_right_DL_: Double Leg CMJ Concentric Impulse — Right (N·s)
LSI_ci_DL_: Double Leg CMJ Concentric Impulse — LSI (%)
pf_left_DL_: Double Leg CMJ Relative Peak Landing Force — Left (N/BW)
pf_right_DL_: Double Leg CMJ Relative Peak Landing Force — Right (N/BW)
LSI_pf_DL_: Double Leg CMJ Relative Peak Landing Force — LSI (%)
rsidj_DL_: Double Leg Drop Jump Reactive Strength Index (m/s)
ct_DL_dj_: Double Leg Drop Jump Ground Contact Time (s)
asi_DL_dj_: Double Leg Drop Jump Active Stiffness Index (N)
dof_DL_L_: Double Leg Drop Jump Drive-Off Force — Left
dof_DL_R_: Double Leg Drop Jump Drive-Off Force — Right
LSI_dof_DL_: Double Leg Drop Jump Drive-Off Force — LSI (%)
pk_left_DLdj_: Double Leg Drop Jump Relative Peak Landing Force — Left (N/BW)
pk_right_DLdj_: Double Leg Drop Jump Relative Peak Landing Force — Right (N/BW)
LSI_pk_DLDJ_: Double Leg Drop Jump Relative Peak Landing Force — LSI (%)
105rsi_DL_: Double Leg 10-5 Repeated Hops Reactive Strength Index (m/s)
105jh_DL_: Double Leg 10-5 Repeated Hops Jump Height (cm)
105ct_DL_: Double Leg 10-5 Repeated Hops Ground Contact Time (s)
jhSL_L_: Single Leg CMJ Jump Height — Left (cm)
jhSL_R_: Single Leg CMJ Jump Height — Right (cm)
LSI_jhSL_: Single Leg CMJ Jump Height — LSI (%)
EcBra_SLCMJL_: Single Leg CMJ Eccentric Braking Impulse — Left (N·s)
EcBra_SLCMJR_: Single Leg CMJ Eccentric Braking Impulse — Right (N·s)
LSI_EcBra_SLCMJ_: Single Leg CMJ Eccentric Braking Impulse — LSI (%)
EcDel_SLCMJL_: Single Leg CMJ Eccentric Deceleration Impulse — Left (N·s)
EcDel_SLCMJR_: Single Leg CMJ Eccentric Deceleration Impulse — Right (N·s)
LSI_EcDel_SLCMJ_: Single Leg CMJ Eccentric Deceleration Impulse — LSI (%)
ci_left_SL_: Single Leg CMJ Concentric Impulse — Left (N·s)
ci_right_SL_: Single Leg CMJ Concentric Impulse — Right (N·s)
LSI_ci_SL_: Single Leg CMJ Concentric Impulse — LSI (%)
ciP1_left_SL_: Single Leg CMJ Concentric Impulse Early Phase — Left (N·s)
ciP1_right_SL_: Single Leg CMJ Concentric Impulse Early Phase — Right (N·s)
LSI_ciP1_SL_: Single Leg CMJ Concentric Impulse Early Phase — LSI (%)
ciP2_left_SL_: Single Leg CMJ Concentric Impulse Late Phase — Left (N·s)
ciP2_right_SL_: Single Leg CMJ Concentric Impulse Late Phase — Right (N·s)
LSI_ciP2_SL_: Single Leg CMJ Concentric Impulse Late Phase — LSI (%)
rsidj_left_SL_: Single Leg Drop Jump Reactive Strength Index — Left (m/s)
rsidj_right_SL_: Single Leg Drop Jump Reactive Strength Index — Right (m/s)
LSI_rsidj_SL_: Single Leg Drop Jump Reactive Strength Index — LSI (%)
jhSL_djL_: Single Leg Drop Jump Height — Left (cm)
jhSL_djR_: Single Leg Drop Jump Height — Right (cm)
LSI_jhSL_dj_: Single Leg Drop Jump Height — LSI (%)
ct_SL_djL_: Single Leg Drop Jump Ground Contact Time — Left (s)
ct_SL_djR_: Single Leg Drop Jump Ground Contact Time — Right (s)
LSI_ctSL_dj_: Single Leg Drop Jump Ground Contact Time — LSI (%)
act_SL_djL_: Single Leg Drop Jump Active Stiffness Index — Left (N)
act_SL_djR_: Single Leg Drop Jump Active Stiffness Index — Right (N)
LSI_act_SL_dj_: Single Leg Drop Jump Active Stiffness Index — LSI (%)
dof_SL_L_: Single Leg Drop Jump Drive-Off Force — Left (N)
dof_SL_R_: Single Leg Drop Jump Drive-Off Force — Right (N)
LSI_dof_SL_: Single Leg Drop Jump Drive-Off Force — LSI (%)
105rsiL_SL_: Single Leg 10-5 Repeated Hops RSI — Left (m/s)
105rsiR_SL_: Single Leg 10-5 Repeated Hops RSI — Right (m/s)
LSI_105rsi_SL_: Single Leg 10-5 Repeated Hops RSI — LSI (%)
105jhL_SL_: Single Leg 10-5 Repeated Hops Jump Height — Left (cm)
105jhR_SL_: Single Leg 10-5 Repeated Hops Jump Height — Right (cm)
LSI_105jh_SL_: Single Leg 10-5 Repeated Hops Jump Height — LSI (%)
105ctL_SL_: Single Leg 10-5 Repeated Hops Ground Contact Time — Left (s)
105ctR_SL_: Single Leg 10-5 Repeated Hops Ground Contact Time — Right (s)
LSI_105ct_SL_: Single Leg 10-5 Repeated Hops Ground Contact Time — LSI (%)
sq_cppL_: Single Leg Squat Concentric Peak Power — Left (W)
sq_cppR_: Single Leg Squat Concentric Peak Power — Right (W)
LSI_sqcpp_: Single Leg Squat Concentric Peak Power — LSI (%)
